Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Image.alt: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Video.summary: Our ’81 Mustang Cobra gets fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Image.alt: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.
Video.title: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Image.alt: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle Payoff

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: We'll help you troubleshoot your F-150 with tips and tricks to keep your truck running reliably.
Video.title: Ford Fix it Show

Video.summary: We’re prepping a big-block Ford to go in our big blue F-150.
Video.title: Ford F-150: Preparation F

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.

Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.title: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: The ’69 Dodge Charger gets a new custom exhaust to go with that Hellcrate Engine.
Video.title: Exhausted Hard Charger!

Video.summary: Tommy puts the finishing touches on Project Hard Charger's hood.
Video.title: Charger Hood and Interior

Video.summary: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Hits the Street

Video.summary: We head to Dallas for the Mecum Auction and run our Hellcat powered Charger across the block.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Goes to Mecum

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: A new project is started: transforming a 1970 Camaro RS into a stock-style RS/SS 396.
Video.title: Project Limelight Debut

Video.summary: Learn how to fix old sheetmetal repairs and rust spots as Rick and Tommy work on the 1970 Camaro.
Video.title: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Image.alt: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
